category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Malaysia.

title.en: China-to-Malaysia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入马来西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入馬來西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Malaysia Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST) and SIRIM requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, ST Certificate of Approval (CoA) and grid-connection requirements, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与马来西亚能源委员会（ST）和SIRIM要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、ST设备批准证书（CoA）及并网要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與馬來西亞能源委員會（ST）和SIRIM要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、ST設備批准證書（CoA）及併網要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Malaysia, the confirmed practical gaps are: IEC-based safety evidence required under MS IEC 61851-1 and ST equipment guidelines; connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) and CCS2 (DC), which are physically incompatible with GB/T connectors; a Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST) Certificate of Approval (CoA) for EV charging equipment before installation; SIRIM certification for electrical equipment imports; and OCPP back-office interoperability for networked public chargers. Malaysia operates on 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase, 50 Hz — the same nominal grid frequency as China but at a higher single-phase voltage than China's domestic 220 V baseline, requiring input-range confirmation. GB/T 27930 DC communication is incompatible with the IEC 61851-24 / CCS2 communication stack used in Malaysia's IEC-aligned charging ecosystem. Exporters should confirm the exact ST CoA requirement, product scope, and any MyHIJAU or ChargEV network integration requirements at the project stage before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入马来西亚时，已确认的实务差距包括：MS IEC 61851-1及ST设备指引要求的IEC体系安全证据；由于马来西亚IEC体系基础设施在物理上与GB/T接口不兼容，须将接口从GB/T 20234硬件改造为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）；充电设备安装前须取得马来西亚能源委员会（ST）设备批准证书（CoA）；进口电气设备须取得SIRIM认证；联网公共充电桩须具备OCPP后台互操作能力。马来西亚电网为240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz——与中国电网频率相同，但单相电压高于中国国内220 V基线，须确认输入电压范围。GB/T 27930直流通信与马来西亚IEC体系充电生态系统所用的IEC 61851-24 / CCS2通信栈不兼容。出口商应在出货前在项目阶段确认具体的ST CoA要求、产品适用范围，以及MyHIJAU或ChargEV网络集成要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入馬來西亞時，已確認的實務差距包括：MS IEC 61851-1及ST設備指引要求的IEC體系安全證據；由於馬來西亞IEC體系基礎設施在物理上與GB/T接口不兼容，須將接口從GB/T 20234硬件改造為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）；充電設備安裝前須取得馬來西亞能源委員會（ST）設備批准證書（CoA）；進口電氣設備須取得SIRIM認證；聯網公共充電樁須具備OCPP後台互操作能力。馬來西亞電網為240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz——與中國電網頻率相同，但單相電壓高於中國國內220 V基線，須確認輸入電壓範圍。GB/T 27930直流通訊與馬來西亞IEC體系充電生態系統所用的IEC 61851-24 / CCS2通訊棧不兼容。出口商應在出貨前在項目階段確認具體的ST CoA要求、產品適用範圍，以及MyHIJAU或ChargEV網絡集成要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ST CoA scope determination, SIRIM certification, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Malaysia conformity assessment rules, ST and SIRIM requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ST CoA适用范围裁定、SIRIM认证、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行马来西亚合格评定规则、ST和SIRIM要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ST CoA適用範圍裁定、SIRIM認證、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行馬來西亞合格評定規則、ST和SIRIM要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
